message:
fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to 3 cards (#6217 part 2) (#6256)

* fix(freshness): add RefreshIndicator to 3 cards (#6217 part 2)

Continues #6217 from part 1 (#6239). Adds the standard `RefreshIndicator`
component to three more cards from the auto-QA list:

* QuotaHeatmap — pods cache, header right
* ISO27001Audit — audit cache, header right (icon-only, label hidden)
* ClusterChangelog — events cache, header right

Each follows the part-1 pattern: pull `lastRefresh` from the existing
cache hook, render the indicator with `staleThresholdMinutes=5`, guard
the timestamp with `typeof === 'number'` so a `0` epoch is preserved.

Refs #6217 (12 cards remaining for parts 3+).

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test: bump raw-hex ratchet for #6217 part 2 issue refs

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
